item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes the requested new gift-handling channel as a default, identifies the repeated pattern across exchange, points, preorder, and gift cases, and moves upstream to front-desk classification/intake rules. It permits only a bounded temporary emergency counter while requiring closure, evidence collection, and a unified routing redesign before the next business day. This satisfies the anti-spiral wakeup and avoids the fail signal of simply adding another queue."}
